mobile.app_storage.tip: Tip: For large files, copy them to App Storage first
mobile.app_storage.empty_instructions:
App Storage is empty.

To use large files without copying:
1. Open a file manager app
2. Copy files to:
   {{.Path}}
3. Come back and select them here

mobile.file_access_failed_unsafe_name: Failed to access file: unsafe file name
mobile.folder_selection.unsupported:
Folder selection is not fully supported on Android.

For folders, please:
1. Copy your folder to App Storage using a file manager
2. Use 'App Storage (large files)' button to select it

App Storage path:
{{.Path}}
mobile.folder_selection.title: Folder Selection
